ab: Talamiliso’ ci fakian kako ato ci mama ako inacila.
ch: 昨天我和我爸爸去拜訪叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Pasowal sa cingra i tamiyanan, ma’epong ko fadahong no loma’.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Misanga’ ho cingra to fadahong i, nani fadahong a matefad.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂掉下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Mihawikid ci mama to titi no kolong ato ’icep a pafeli ci fakian.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Miholol kako ato ci faki i kafoti’an, adihay ko mipalada’an ningra a kimad.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: I’ayaw no piliyas ako, malata’ang ci faki i takowanan, takaraw to a tanektek to saan.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Sowal han nako “maadah to ko wa’ay ni faki, liyaw han tayni misalama i loma’ niyam.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
